script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo '========== 1. CONTROL-BRIDGE LOGS (last hour) =========='
journalctl -u control-bridge --since '1 hour ago' --no-pager -n 100 2>/dev/null || docker logs --since 1h control-bridge 2>/dev/null || echo 'No journalctl/docker logs found'

echo ''
echo '========== 2. TRAEFIK ACCESS LOG (last hour) =========='
if [ -f /opt/n8n-traefik/logs/access.log ]; then
  tail -200 /opt/n8n-traefik/logs/access.log | grep -i 'api.marbomebel' | tail -50 2>/dev/null || echo 'No api.marbomebel entries'
elif [ -f /var/log/traefik/access.log ]; then
  tail -200 /var/log/traefik/access.log | tail -50 2>/dev/null
else
  echo 'Traefik access log not found, checking docker:'
  docker logs --since 1h traefik 2>/dev/null | tail -50 || docker logs --since 1h n8n-traefik 2>/dev/null | tail -50 || echo 'No traefik logs'
fi

echo ''
echo '========== 3. GREP chatgpt/openai in logs =========='
journalctl -u control-bridge --since '24 hours ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -i -E 'chatgpt|openai|gpt|actions' | tail -20 || echo 'No chatgpt/openai mentions in journalctl'
if [ -f /opt/n8n-traefik/logs/access.log ]; then
  grep -i -E 'chatgpt|openai|gpt' /opt/n8n-traefik/logs/access.log | tail -20 || echo 'No chatgpt/openai in traefik access log'
fi

echo ''
echo '========== 4. RAW TOKEN AUTH TEST (no Bearer prefix) =========='
curl -sS --connect-timeout 5 -w '\nHTTP_CODE: %{http_code}\n' -H 'Authorization: 46924d4253c3dc5dc6474779fdbb595e3f83c29a' https://api.marbomebel.ru/jobs/active 2>&1

echo ''
echo '========== 5. BEARER TOKEN AUTH TEST (with prefix) =========='
curl -sS --connect-timeout 5 -w '\nHTTP_CODE: %{http_code}\n' -H 'Authorization: Bearer 46924d4253c3dc5dc6474779fdbb595e3f83c29a' https://api.marbomebel.ru/jobs/active 2>&1

echo ''
echo '========== 6. CURRENT APP.PY VERSION (verify_token function) =========='
grep -A 15 'def verify_token' /opt/control-bridge/app.py 2>/dev/null || echo 'app.py not found at /opt/control-bridge/'

echo ''
echo '========== 7. SERVICE STATUS =========='
systemctl status control-bridge --no-pager 2>/dev/null || echo 'Not a systemd service'

echo ''
echo '========== DONE =========='
intent: Diagnose why ChatGPT Actions cannot call API — logs + auth test
